'''Lokondo''' was an icy world in the [[Braxant sector/Legends|Braxant sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

Lokondo was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base, where the Empire kept extremely dangerous prisoners. The remote facility was also used for the research and testing of an experimental personal [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] system. After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] was captured by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and imprisoned on Lokondo until he was rescued by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="YS" />
{{Planet-stub}}
